description: North Mesopotamian Marker - highly informative for Kurdish and Northern Fertile Crescent populations.
South Caucasus/Azeri Marker - diagnostic for populations of the Caucasus and Northwestern Iran.
West Asian/Middle Eastern Informative Marker - diagnostic for Afroasiatic and Indo-Iranian speaking populations of the Near East.
Peninsular Arabian Marker - highly informative for populations of the Arabian Peninsula.
Levantine Endemic Marker - diagnostic for the indigenous populations of the Levant.
HERC2 variant - informative for West Eurasian and Middle Eastern populations, associated with eye color.
HERC2/OCA2 region marker - highly informative for Middle Eastern and Mediterranean populations.
TP53 variant - found at varying frequencies in Middle Eastern and European populations.
Levantine Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from the Levant region.
North African (MENA) Marker - informative for Maghreb and North African populations.
Middle Eastern Ancestry Marker - informative for general Middle Eastern populations.
Middle Eastern Ancestry Marker - informative for general Middle Eastern populations.
North African Ancestry Marker - highly prevalent in Maghreb and Egyptian populations.
North African Ancestry Marker - informative for distinguishing North African from Sub-Saharan African.
North African Ancestry Marker - high frequency in Berber and Arab-Berber populations.
North African Ancestry Marker - useful for identifying North African ancestry components.
North African Ancestry Marker - highly specific to populations of the Maghreb.
North African Ancestry Marker - diagnostic for North African genetic signatures.
MENA/EUR Tie-Breaker - Frequent in the Levant and Anatolia, drops off sharply in Southern Europe.
NAFR/EUR Tie-Breaker - Distinctive Maghreb marker, filters out false Iberian/Southern European overlap.
MENA/AFR Tie-Breaker - Distinctive to the Arabian Peninsula, filters out false Horn of Africa overlap.
NAFR/AFR Tie-Breaker - Prevents Sahel/Saharan border populations from misclassifying as strictly Sub-Saharan.
MENA/SAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors populations to the Iranian plateau and West Asia, filtering out South Asian noise.
NAFR/MENA Tie-Breaker - Deep autochthonous Maghrebi marker, sharply reduces false Middle Eastern overlap.
MENA/NAFR Tie-Breaker - Natufian-derived Levantine marker, preventing Egyptian/North African misclassification.
MENA/SAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors Iranian Plateau genetics against Indo-Aryan overlap.
NAFR/AFR Tie-Breaker - Anchors indigenous Berber/Maghrebi components against Sub-Saharan gene flow.
Jewish-Ancestry Marker - highly informative for Levantine-derived populations.
Iranian Plateau Diagnostic - informative for populations originating from the Persian core.
Saharan Amazigh Marker - diagnostic for the indigenous Berber populations.
Common Mediterranean/Levantine marker often elevated in Jewish Diasporic populations.
SLC45A2 variant associated with West Asian/MENA depigmentation.
